query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.isActive, COUNT(pc.id) as city_count
FROM partners p
LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.partnerId = pc.partnerId AND pc.contractStatus = 'active'
WHERE p.isActive = 1
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.isActive
HAVING city_count = 0;
